settings.intro: At Kefey®, we believe that joy inspires action, and great opportunities deserve to be shared. Become part of our global Ambassador community and help introduce Kefey Gummies to people everywhere. Whether you're a content creator, an influencer, or simply someone who loves sharing things that genuinely make a difference, Kefey gives you a simple and rewarding way to turn positivity into real income.

settings.title: Real-Time Insights
settings.description: Access a clean, intuitive dashboard that shows your clicks, sales, and commissions instantly — so you always know exactly how you're performing.

settings.title: Fast Payouts
settings.description: Get rewarded without delays. Our payout process is fast, transparent, and designed to support your growth.

settings.title: All-in-One Ambassador Portal
settings.description: Manage everything from one place. Track your Kefey.ca sales, receive your personalized affiliate link, and share your unique promo code with your audience effortlessly.

settings.title: Share & Earn
settings.description: Give your community 15% off every order, while you earn a 15% commission on each sale. A win-win built for long-term success.

settings.title: Global Availability
settings.description: No matter where your audience lives, they can order Kefey. Earn commissions from followers worldwide – we ship to 150+ countries.

settings.title: High Average Order Value (AOV)
settings.description: With an average order of $50+, your commissions add up fast. The more joy you share, the more you earn!
